title: Who may participate; Required Capitalization. Any Filipino citizen acting
content: 43 as a sole proprietor or a partnership, a one-person corporation, or a corporation, at least 44 seventy-five percent (75%) of the authorized and voting capital stock which is owned and 45 controlled by Filipino citizens, may engage in the business of recruitment and placement 46 of Filipino seafarers. This is without prejudice to the anti-dummy provisions of applicable 47 laws, rules and regulations. 48 49 The sole proprietor or partnership shall have a minimum capitalization of Five Million 50 Pesos (Php 5,000,000.00). In the case of a corporation, it shall have a minimum paid-up 51 capital in cash of Five Million Pesos (Php 5,000,000.00). 52 53 The sole proprietor, partnership, one-person corporation, or corporation should 54 substantially maintain an equity at Five Million Pesos (Php 5,000,000.00) during the 55 duration of its license. 56 57
